worldData.instructions:
HANABI (花火) — a fireworks night over a still bay.

CLICK anywhere — send a shell up; it bursts where you aimed. Aim high for a slow willow, low for a quick peony.

There is no goal. The sky keeps launching on its own; every burst reflects in the water. Just watch the festival.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: HANABI: launch fireworks on click + ambient; rockets rise and bloom

visualTypes.name: hanabi
